etymology.description: 日(日) (rì, "sun") + 堇(堇) (jǐn, "burning") = sun + burning -> dry
etymology.interpretation: The character 暵(xiàn, "dry") combines the semantic element 日(日) (rì, "sun") to indicate light or heat, with the phonetic component 堇(堇) (jǐn, "burning"), which signifies intense heat as seen in its depiction of fire. This suggests an environment parched by the sun.
